# [T1 thread-create+tool-call] Use execute-tool...
Folder: cron

tool:

user: [T6e-phase1 wakeUp-deadstream-setup] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'dead-stream-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. You should receive a taskId (no imageUrl yet). End with STEP_OK if taskId is present, FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl is present and non-empty, then end with

user: [T7a approve-phase1] In a single response, call BOTH at the same time: (1) execute-tool with toolName='tool-help' and instanceId='hermes' to list available tools, and (2) execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'approve-test'}. The generate_image tool requires user confirmation - it should NOT execute yet. End your reply with STEP_OK after the tool calls.
